name: breadcrumbs
description: Add typed-links to your Obsidian notes

scripts.build:esbuild: tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && svelte-check && bun run esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.build: bun run clean && bun run build:css && bun run build:esbuild
scripts.version:prod: bun run version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json package.json
scripts.version:beta: bun run version-bump-beta.mjs && git add manifest-beta.json versions.json package.json
scripts.release:beta: bun run version:beta && git commit -m 'release:beta' && git push origin master:master && git tag -a $npm_package_version -m "$npm_package_version" && git push --tags
scripts.coverage:ui: vitest run --config vite.config.mjs --coverage --coverage.include 'src/**' --coverage.reporter html && vite preview --outDir ./coverage --open
scripts.fmt: bun run wasm:fmt && bun run prettier --write ./src
scripts.postwasm:build: printf '# README auto-generated by wasm-pack; not needed in repo\nREADME.md\n' > wasm/pkg/.gitignore
scripts.postwasm:dev: printf '# README auto-generated by wasm-pack; not needed in repo\nREADME.md\n' > wasm/pkg/.gitignore
scripts.postwasm:profile: printf '# README auto-generated by wasm-pack; not needed in repo\nREADME.md\n' > wasm/pkg/.gitignore

author: michaelpporter
